# 3vo.ai — LLMs.txt
# Instructions for AI assistants and LLM crawlers

## What is 3vo.ai?
3vo.ai is an AI-native product studio building at the intersection of agents, crypto,
and the creator economy. We ship digital products that generate revenue, then iterate.

## Products
- Notion Template OS (productivity for freelancers): https://templates.3vo.ai
- AI Prompt Packs (tools for solopreneurs): https://prompts.3vo.ai
- Automation Workflow Templates (no-code for SMBs): https://tools.3vo.ai
- Niche Reports (market research): https://validate.3vo.ai
- VC Match Kit (fundraising): https://vc.3vo.ai
- Goffer AI (knowledge assistant): https://goffer.ai
- LinkedIn Signal Outreach Pack (sales): https://liorscribe.gumroad.com/l/gpwny
- AI Agents (freelance workflow automation): https://prompts.3vo.ai/agents

## Primary use cases
- Freelancers who need professional client documents (NDAs, SOWs, proposals) without legal fees
- Solopreneurs automating outreach, content, and client work with tested AI prompts
- Small businesses eliminating manual workflows with no-code automation templates
- Founders validating niches with data-backed market reports
- Startups matching with relevant VCs before a raise

## Contact
- General inquiries: https://3vo.ai/contact

## Authoritative sources
- Official site: https://3vo.ai
- Official blog: https://3vo.ai/blog

## Blog
- How to get your digital products cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini: https://3vo.ai/blog/how-3vo-gets-cited-by-llms
